problem id: 5756de38
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(2) AND SHR(3)) XOR SHR(6)

examples:
  01100101 -> 00000101
  00010101 -> 00000000
  01101001 -> 00000101
  10010110 -> 00010010
  11101010 -> 00001011
  01000101 -> 00000001
  10101010 -> 00000010
  11101101 -> 00010111

query: 10101100
predicted answer: 00010010
